title: Run lora_ping on T1000-E hardware
description: Hardware backend for project-LICHEN-m5m1.3. No T1000-E CDC/UF2 device was attached during validation; only /dev/tty.usbserial-A704ESXG was present. Flashing would also overwrite device firmware and requires explicit human authorization. Build, flash through the documented serial DFU path, observe post-reset console/radio TX independently, and restore desired firmware afterward.
acceptance_criteria: 1. A T1000-E is explicitly authorized and identified by its documented USB identity. 2. Current lora_ping firmware is built and flashed without touching unrelated devices. 3. Post-reset console plus independent radio/TX evidence is captured with artifact hash. 4. Device is restored if requested.
close_reason: Reconciled under project-LICHEN-io1k: stale selectors fixed, native32/x86 builder classified under evidence-needed but inventory updated, T1000-E physical BLOCKED (no device), selectors/docs/matrix/classifications (WIN build, FAIL sim where applicable, BLOCKED physical) complete. All fragments classified. Epic children closed.
